items.title: Resource suggestion: free Layoff Recovery Action Plan Generator
items.description:
Hi! I built a free no-login Layoff Recovery Action Plan Generator that may fit job-search/career transition resources:

https://cleo-ai-ops.github.io/client-intake-autopilot-pack/layoff-recovery-action-plan-generator/

It helps recently laid-off job seekers turn the first week into a calm plan: proof inventory, warm outreach, recruiter brief, and focused applications. Companion paid kit: https://cleo-ai-ops.github.io/client-intake-autopilot-pack/layoff-recovery-sprint-kit/

Happy to adjust wording/category if useful.

items.title: Suggestion: Free Weekly Status Report Generator
items.description:
Hi! I built a free no-login Weekly Status Report Generator for freelancers, consultants, agencies, PMs, and remote teams.

Tool: https://cleo-ai-ops.github.io/client-intake-autopilot-pack/weekly-status-report-generator/
Companion kit: https://cleo-ai-ops.github.io/client-intake-autopilot-pack/weekly-client-status-report-kit/

It turns rough project notes into a client-facing weekly update with project health, progress, decisions needed, risks, and recommended next step. If it fits your productivity/project-management resources, happy to adjust wording. Thanks!

items.title: Resource suggestion: free Meeting Decision Log Generator
items.description:
Hi — I built a free no-login tool that may fit this collection:

https://cleo-ai-ops.github.io/client-intake-autopilot-pack/meeting-decision-log-generator/

It turns rough meeting notes into a clean decision log with confirmed decisions, action items, risks/dependencies, and “please correct by…” wording. It is aimed at consultants, project managers, founders, freelancers, and remote teams that need clearer meeting follow-up.

Source/search repo: https://github.com/cleo-ai-ops/meeting-decision-log-generator
Companion free action-item generator: https://cleo-ai-ops.github.io/client-intake-autopilot-pack/meeting-action-item-generator/
Paid kit is linked from the page, but this suggested resource is free and usable directly in-browser. If it is not a fit, no worries.

items.title: Suggestion: Free Meeting Action Item Generator
items.description:
Hi! I built a free no-login Meeting Action Item Generator that turns rough meeting notes into a recap email with decisions, owners, deadlines, and open risks.

Tool: https://cleo-ai-ops.github.io/client-intake-autopilot-pack/meeting-action-item-generator/

It is meant for consultants, PMs, founders, freelancers, and remote teams who need cleaner meeting follow-up. If it fits your productivity/project-management resources, happy to adjust wording. Thanks!

items.title: Add claudio: productivity tool for remote workers with voice dictation
items.description:
Repository: https://github.com/ayushkumar1808/claudio

claudio is a free, open-source macOS tool that enables system-wide voice dictation using your Claude subscription. Hold Space in any app (Slack, email, browser, terminal) to dictate text. Useful productivity tool for remote workers.

items.title: Hiring: AI Team Lead (Remote, ScholarshipOwl)
items.description:
We’re looking for a hands-on and strategic **AI Team Lead** to drive growth of our AI/ML capabilities at [ScholarshipOwl](https://scholarshipowl.com/).

What You’ll Do

- Lead a small, high-impact ML team
- Architect & deploy ML solutions (LLMs, RAG, CV, Recommenders)
- Collaborate with product & engineering
- Own the AI roadmap

Requirements

- 2+ years ML engineering
- Experience with deep learning, ML pipelines, and production
- Hands-on with LLMs / RAG / CV / Recommenders
- Remote-first communication skills

Why Join

- Mission-driven (help students access education)
- Remote, unlimited PTO
- $200/month home office budget
- Small team, high impact

👉 Apply here: https://careers.scholarshipowl.com/o/ai-team-lead
